overall.description: First-person gameplay from a post-apocalyptic video game (Fallout 4) showing a player character walking along a waterfront promenade with a power armor companion, viewing a collapsed pier and distant city skyline, then entering the water and swimming toward the wreckage.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade with a power armor companion

notable_agents.action: power armor companion walking alongside the player

entered.detail: large bulky power armor suit with helmet and mechanical joints
ornate stone balustrade along the waterfront edge
large collapsed concrete and metal structure extending into the water
post-apocalyptic cityscape with damaged skyscrapers and haze
small boat moored near the collapsed pier wreckage
calm harbor water with gentle ripples

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a concrete waterfront promenade with a stone railing on the right. A power armor companion walks on the left. In the distance across the water, a collapsed pier structure and post-apocalyptic city skyline are visible under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront path with distant bridge view

events.description: large arch bridge becomes visible on the right horizon as camera pans

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path while panning right to view the bridge

entered.detail: green steel arch bridge spanning the water in the distance
patch of brown dry grass along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking along the waterfront as the power armor companion falls behind and out of view. The camera pans right, revealing a large arch bridge in the distance on the right. The collapsed pier structure moves to the left side of the frame while dry grass appears along the path edge.

events.description: character enters the water from the promenade and begins swimming forward

agents.ego_description: entering the water and swimming toward the collapsed pier wreckage

segments.scene_description: The player descends from the promenade into the water and begins swimming toward the collapsed pier structure. The stone railing and dry grass recede behind as the water fills the lower frame. The collapsed wreckage grows larger in the center of view as the camera approaches it.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a concrete waterfront promenade into the open water toward a distant ruin. It begins with a walk along a stone railing accompanied by a power armor companion, with a collapsed pier and a post-apocalyptic city skyline visible under a clear blue sky. As the companion falls behind and out of view, the camera pans right to reveal a large arch bridge in the distance while dry grass begins to line the path. The scene then shifts as the player descends from the promenade and enters the water, causing the railing and grass to recede. Finally, the camera swims forward, with the water filling the lower frame as the collapsed wreckage grows larger and more central in the view.
